prompt_task: A collaborator sent me variant.status.q1.bam corresponding to a single-end RNA-seq experiment from an individual mapped to hg38. What is the likely variant status at position chrX:154,398,500 (1-based) for this individual? Respond in the format x/y, where x and y are one of A,C,G,T and x<y lexicographically, or x=y if homozygous. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
